{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323033531D207AFAAD45168C4F4F9"}"},"total":1232},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353651062153610009","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本书写的非常不错，作者加油更新，主角设定看的还是比较不错的，有仇报仇，有怨报怨，挺喜欢这个设定三观的，第一次点评，实在是觉得作者写的不错，看见评论区有各种发言，没有那个世界设定是完美的，主角思维不代表作者思维，作者又不是写的自传，非常看好这本书[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712157453,"group_id":"7294641608199244815","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N02UYXfiz2r1INhze3VASTIMyXFEdKxbe2bvejfZGVyZ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3368520064699591","user_name":"牛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3368520064699591","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7294641608199244815","book_info":{"abstract":"【成长+搞笑+微惊悚+爽文+腹黑+杀伐果断】
穿越九叔的世界，还不知情的顾枫意外遭遇第一只僵尸，凭借九叔电影的熏陶，顾枫启用了伴随两世的童子身。
僵尸到来，手持童子尿的顾枫咧开嘴角。
“嘿嘿嘿，小僵尸，嘿嘿!”
绑定“美好签到系统”，性格谨慎的顾枫开始以游方道士的身份签到各个僵尸剧情。
第一站，打卡任家镇。
顾枫：“心中无女人，拔剑自然神。”
任婷婷：“男人，你成功吸引了我的注意。”
顾枫：“呵，女人，不过是谋夺我童子身的家伙，童子尿此等保命之物，岂可被人截断!”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/793c275ad0927c449ec4d7dc04b0c2cb","author":"躺了躺了","author_id":"","book_id":"7294641608199244815","book_name":"僵尸：在九叔世界做游方道士","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":383,"name":"九叔","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=383&name=九叔&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7299882067595100707","read_count":"13238","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1030064"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"508","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,腹黑,九叔,架空,同人,搞笑轻松,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/47573add2efbc688c
